# CFF Fixture Notes

- `otto-cff2-variable.fntdata` is extracted from a PowerPoint export of an open-source `OTF(CFF2/variable)` source font.
- The repository keeps the extracted `.fntdata` only; it does not keep the `.pptx`.
- To refresh the fixture, extract `ppt/fonts/font1.fntdata` from the current local `Presentation1.pptx` and overwrite `testdata/otto-cff2-variable.fntdata`.
